query: White Pine Stampede cross country ski race Mancelona to Bellaire

videos.title: 2009 White Pine Stampede - Michigan Skier Television
videos.description: The White Pine Stampede had over 400 skiers participate this year.  It is one of Michigan's premier cross country ski races.

videos.title: 2014 North American Vasa XC 27K Ski Race
videos.description: The biggest race in Michigan's Lower Peninsula! It was much colder than predicted, but the sun was shining and there was ample snow. Once again NordicSkiRacer.com Master Skier Doug Cornell rocks the head-cam to tunes by The Dirt Surfers.

videos.title: 2019 White Pine Stampede 50km Start
videos.description: Start of the 2019 White Pine Stampede 50km in Mancelona, Michigan. The White Pine Stampede is a Michigan Cup Series race.

videos.title: 2010 White Pine Stampede 40K Race Michigan Skier GLSP
